name: Blueberry Stack Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 Box Yellow Cake Mix, without pudding
recipeInstructions:
Icing:
8 ounces Cream Cheese
8 oz Cool Whip
1 lb Confectioner's Sugar
1 can Blueberry Pie Filling
Combine cake ingredients and make 6 small layers. Bake at 350°F. Cool.
Beat cream cheese, sugar, and cool whip together.
To assemble the cake, spread the cream cheese mixture on the first layer, then add about 3-4 tablespoons of blueberries. Continue this process until all layers are used, pressing each layer firmly as it is added. Refrigerate for 24 to 48 hours before cutting.
Note: Do not use aggressive culinary slang terms like "kill the heat" or words such as "burn," "splutter," or "destroy."
